channel.title: Certification on Ryan Rasti
channel.description: Recent content in Certification on Ryan Rasti
channel.copyright: Give me the strength to be better than I was yesterday.

item.title: Passing the Certified Kubernetes Application Developer Exam in 2020
item.author: rrrasti@yahoo.com (Ryan Rasti)
item.description: Certification Background The Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD) exam is one of two leading Kubernetes certification exams provided by the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF). The exam’s focus is on understanding how to use kubectl and a vanilla Kubernetes installation to quickly spin-up, spin-down, or generally interact with application container architectures. Some examples include creating pods with sidecar containers, understanding how to create most basic API primitives via CLI or YAML manifest, and interacting with multiple namespaces.
